return(function(x,Q,G,E,t,l,q,K,v,i,g,N,L,H,e,B,f,D,y,C,r,w,c,s)f,i,D,K,v,r,B,c,L,s,H,y,e,N,w,C,g=function(x,j)local Q=B(j)local G=function(G,E,t,l,q,D,v)return r(x,{G;E;t,l,q,D;v},j,Q)end return G
